# ASImportableCredential.CustomFields

**Structure**

A representation of CustomFields as defined in the [https://fidoalliance.org/specs/cx/cxf-v1.0-rd-20250313.html]

## Declaration

```swift
struct CustomFields
```

## Initializers

- **init(id:label:fields:)**

## Instance Properties

- **fields**: The collection of fields in this section.
- **id**: Optional: Unique identifier for this section of custom fields.
- **label**: Optional: A descriptive title for this section of custom fields.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
